docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAUM, FRED AS TO DEFENDANT GALLAGHER, GARY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAUM, FRED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALLAGHER, GARY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3012 16TH ST #208 $400.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $400.00, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS. STIPULATED JUDGMENT --- SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE D.R.V. IS $4.93. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAUM, FRED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GALLAGHER, GARY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT GALLAGHER, GARY
